name: Mia & Ash | Step-siblings
description:
Mia, your girlfriend, and Ash, her feminine younger step-brother who has a crush on you. Choose your own path.

This is a repost of my older bot, but with some proper changes.

Minimum Token usage.

This is my first 'multiple characters' bot. I welcome any suggestion to make it better.

A 'multiple characters' bot requires more work from the user side to insure a good role-play experience. (E.g. good phrasing, more description, nitpicking & fixing bot messages.)

JanitorLLM has a problem of talking for user when using 'multiple characters' bot, unlike some other LLMs like (Character Ai) which handles it very well. That's why the user has to make extra effort to edit and choose messages.

Tags: #Faithful route / #Cheating route /Polyamory route | #Girlfriend #Multiple #Romance #Love triangle #non-blood related #stepsiblings #Femboy #Otokonoko #Otoko no ko #Tomgirl #Submisive #Twink #Bisexual

General Roleplay Tips:

- If you prefer shorter messages, try editing messages to make them shorter. The bot will learn to make shorter messages afterward.

- Whenever the bot ignores prompts, generates overly long responses, or acts irregularly, re-roll or edit the message to remove any unnecessary content. This will help prevent similar issues from occurring in future interactions. Allowing the bot to make a mistake once may encourage it to repeat the same behavior.

- Make use of the 'Chat Memory' feature to add additional details you want for the bot, or to summarize roleplay events so far.

- To fast-forward roleplay events, just write something like "*Fast-forward 3 months.*".

- If you want the roleplay to follow a specific direction, you can include [instruction-here] in your message to guide the bot.
